key.name: widget-width
key.description: Width of the media player widget in pixels Range: 160 - 500

key.name: background-opacity
key.description: Opacity of the media player widget 0 = fully transparent, 1 = fully opaque

key.name: show-artist
key.description: Shows artist name below the song title

key.name: tint-from-art
key.summary: Tint the widget from the album art
key.description: When enabled, the widget background is tinted with the dominant colour of the current album art. When disabled, a neutral dark background is used.

key.name: show-on-all-monitors
key.summary: Show the widget on all monitors
key.description: When enabled, the widget appears on every dock (all monitors). When disabled, it only appears on the primary monitor's dock.

key.name: animation-duration
key.description: Duration of expand and collapse animations of the widget Set to 0 to disable animations Valid range: 0 - 1000

key.name: widget-position
key.description: Where to show the widget inside the dock 'start' places it before the app icons, 'end' places it after them.

key.name: scroll-action
key.description: What happens when you scroll over the widget. 'volume' changes the player volume, 'track' skips forward/backward, 'none' disables scroll.

key.name: click-action
key.description: What happens when you click on the album art or empty card area. 'open-player' raises the player window, 'play-pause' toggles playback, 'none' does nothing.

key.name: font-scale
key.description: Scale factor for the title and artist text. 1.0 is the default size, 0.8 is smaller, 1.4 is larger.

key.name: corner-radius
key.description: Border radius of the card in pixels. Set to 0 for sharp corners, up to 24 for very rounded.

key.name: art-style
key.description: Shape of the album art thumbnail. 'rounded' uses concentric corners with the card, 'circle' makes it fully round, 'square' removes all rounding.

key.name: show-album-art
key.description: Display the album art thumbnail in the widget
